patterns.cause: Cross-reference target '{match}' not found in document
patterns.fix: Check that the xref ID exists and matches the anchor in the target file
Verify the include path is correct relative to the document root
Ensure the referenced ID is defined in an included file
Run 'ccutil compile' locally and check the full error output
Review the warning and fix the AsciiDoc source
Fix the AsciiDoc syntax error in the source file

patterns.cause: Podman could not pull the ccutil container image
patterns.fix: Check network connectivity and that quay.io/ivanhorvath/ccutil:amazing is accessible
Reduce --jobs concurrency or increase available memory

patterns.cause: File permission error, likely SELinux or volume mount issue
patterns.fix: Ensure Podman volume mount uses :z flag and files are readable

patterns.cause: The master.adoc entry point is missing
patterns.fix: Verify the title directory contains a master.adoc file
Fix the broken link or add to .lycheeignore
